scene_description:
### Foreground  
- **Road surface**: Asphalt with white dashed lane markings (center) and a white solid line (right edge). The road shows visible cracks.  
- **Right edge of road**: A light gray concrete curb. Adjacent to the curb is a dirt/sand sidewalk area. A black-and-silver drainage grate is visible on the far right edge of the sidewalk.  
- **Right side (mid-foreground)**: Two small deciduous trees with green leaves and dark brown trunks, planted in the dirt sidewalk area.  
- **Left side (mid-foreground)**: A silver metal guardrail (curved top, mounted on vertical posts) runs parallel to the road. The guardrail separates the road from a parking area.  
- **Left foreground**: A white truck with blue and red text: “GS25”, “Supermarket”, and “H. 010-5256-7950” (Latin script, blue text on white background, red “25”). The truck’s rear is partially visible.  
- **Left side (near road edge)**: Three orange-and-white cone-shaped bollards, spaced along the road.  

### Midground  
- **Left side (near building)**: A red canopy covering a shop. A sign above the canopy displays “안전” (Hangul script, white text on a red background). Additional low-rise buildings with red and yellow signs (Hangul text) are visible behind the canopy.  
- **Left side (further back)**: Wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and power lines (5–6 wires per pole). The poles extend into the background.  
- **Right side (midground)**: A tall stone wall (gray, patterned surface) with a wire-mesh fence on top. Above the wall, a multi-story building with a curved facade.  
  - **Signs on the building**:  
    - A vertical dark green sign with “777” (white text) and additional Hangul text below.  
    - A large blue-and-white billboard with “1 - 김동신” (blue background, yellow “1” and white “김동신” in Hangul).  
    - A red-and-white banner with “오로지! 강화! 오로지! 주민! 김동신이 함께 하겠습니다” (red text, blue background, Hangul script).  
  - A smaller red sign with “수원” (Hangul) is visible below the blue-and-white billboard.  
- **Road center**: A white car driving away (no visible license plate). A blue bus is further in the distance.  
- **Right side (near the wall)**: Sparse green vegetation (weeds) along the base of the stone wall.  

### Background  
- **Left background**: A two-story building with a white upper structure (resembling a small station) and multiple windows. A large “GS25” sign (yellow and red) is visible on its facade.  
- **Center background**: A multi-story building with a flat roof and numerous windows.  
- **Distant background (left)**: Dense green hills or forested areas.  
- **Sky**: Light blue with a few scattered white clouds.  

### Key Details (by category)  
- **TEXT & SIGNS**:  
  - Truck (left foreground): “GS25” (red), “Supermarket” (blue), “H. 010-5256-7950” (blue, Latin).  
  - Shop sign (left midground): “안전” (Hangul, white on red).  
  - Building signs (right midground): “777” (white on dark green, Hangul text below); “1 - 김동신” (blue background, yellow “1”, white Hangul); “오로지! 강화! 오로지! 주민! 김동신이 함께 하겠습니다” (red and blue Hangul).  
- **INFRASTRUCTURE**:  
  - Utility poles (left background): Wooden, with multiple crossbars and 5–6 power lines.  
  - Guardrails (left foreground to midground): Metal, silver, curved top.  
  - Bollards (left midground): Orange/white, cone-shaped.  
  - Stone wall (right midground): Gray, patterned, with wire-mesh fence on top.  
- **VEHICLES & PLATES**:  
  - White truck (left foreground): No visible license plate.  
  - White car (center midground): No visible license plate.  
  - Blue bus (distant background): No visible license plate.  
- **ROAD SURFACE & MARKINGS**:  
  - Asphalt road with white dashed center lines (dashed), white solid right edge line.  
  - Right curb: Light gray concrete.  
  - Driving side: Right-hand traffic (solid line on the right edge, vehicles positioned on the right side of the road).  
- **BUILDINGS & ARCHITECTURE**:  
  - Left side: Low-rise buildings with red canopies, white upper structure (one building).  
  - Right side: Multi-story building with stone wall base, curved facade, and glass panels.  
- **VEGETATION & TERRAIN**:  
  - Right side: Small deciduous trees (midground), sparse weeds.  
  - Distant background: Green hills/forested areas (left).

details.name: GS25 text
details.reason: GS25 is a prominent South Korean convenience store chain.

details.name: red sign
details.reason: The text '수원' refers to Suwon, a major city in South Korea.

details.name: blue-and-white billboard
details.reason: The presence of Hangul script is a definitive indicator of South Korea.
details.focused_description: The blue-and-white billboard is rectangular with a blue background. It features white and yellow Korean (Hangul) text, including "에이벡스학원", "02-534-7117", "1", "김동신", and multiple lines of text such as "두개월만 보게해드려" and "두개월만 보게해드려". The text "1" appears in a yellow box. The billboard displays a person in a white shirt with a brown tie. The material is a printed outdoor banner. The condition appears intact with no visible damage. Markings include the Korean text, the yellow "1" box, and the person’s attire.

details.name: phone number
details.reason: The 010-XXXX-XXXX format is the standard mobile number structure in South Korea.
details.focused_description: The phone number is displayed in black Arabic numerals on a white background with a red border. The visible text is "2410 934-7177", which includes a space between "2410" and "934-7177" and a hyphen separating "934" and "7177". The numbers are printed in a clear, standard font.

details.name: wooden utility poles
details.reason: The pole structure with multiple crossbars is common in South Korean infrastructure.
